title: ABHI FPS BOOST
description: FPS Boost Modpack , Optimized For Improving Game Performance With Essential Mods , Smooth Gameplay , Minimum System Load , PvP Mods Included
body:
## HELLO THERE :))

**Struggling with lag? Want smoother gameplay without changing the core Minecraft experience? This FPS boost modpack is built for maximum performance on low-end to high-end systems — all while keeping the vanilla look and feel!**

## ✅ Features :-

**🚀 Massive FPS boosts with lightweight optimization mods**

**🧠 Smart memory and CPU usage improvements**

**🔧 Fully client-side — works on vanilla and most multiplayer servers**

**🧊 Optional visual enhancements like Sodium + Iris for better graphics without the lag**

## Perfect for :-

**Low-end PCs & laptops**

**PvP players looking for minimal latency**

**Builders who want smooth world loading**

**Vanilla players wanting better performance**

## Ignore Tags :-

**fps boost pvp cpvp vanilla smp lifesteal**

## Contact :-

**Any Suggestions Questions About Modpack You Can DM Me On Discord Username Is abhi7544**
